subcodes.first_line: The Day of Return hath indeed come, and the factions are in manifest turmoil. Among them are those who have denied the bounty of God, His Manifestation and His mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی یوم الماب و الاحزاب فی اضطراب مبین منهم من انکر فضل الله و ظهوره و رحمته
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @prayer for nearness to God, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @power of prayer, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
